question:
Every zumpus is small. Each zumpus is an impus. Every impus is sweet. Impuses are vumpuses. Each vumpus is not feisty. Every vumpus is a dumpus. Every dumpus is not dull. Dumpuses are rompuses. Every rompus is transparent. Rompuses are wumpuses. Each wumpus is not earthy. Wumpuses are tumpuses. Every tumpus is cold. Numpuses are not cold. Tumpuses are yumpuses. Max is a vumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Max is not cold.
error: Failed after 3 attempts. Last error: Undefined name in expression 'ForAll([x], Implies(zumpus(x), small(x)))': name 'x' is not defined
